MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for a settlement conference this day. APPEARANCES: Jack S. Marquez, Esq., for plaintiff David G. Parker. John Fannin, Sr., defendant in propria persona. The case did not settle and will remain on the trial calendar. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: D. Boffi; Reporter: Adonis Duffy, #12599
